name: BB Bounce XAUUSD M15 (Simple)
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, after a wick-through of a Bollinger Band followed by a close back inside, price reverts toward the middle band with positive expectancy, provided volatility is not in the dead zone.

entry_rules.long: low[1] < lower_bb[1] AND close[1] > lower_bb[1] AND close > close[1]
entry_rules.short: high[1] > upper_bb[1] AND close[1] < upper_bb[1] AND close < close[1]
entry_rules.notes: Single-bar rejection; no session filter; no stacked gates beyond the one regime filter.

exit_rules.take_profit: middle BB (SMA20) OR opposite band, whichever hit first

diagnostics.notes: If fewer than 80 raw signals/year pre-gate on 4.5y sample, harness is broken.
